title: WorkCheckpoint
description: Generic resumability checkpoint for long-running agent work (non-assessment).

schema_version.description: Schema version for this file format.

checkpoint_id.description: Unique ID for this checkpoint file (filename stem).

program.description: Program slug this checkpoint belongs to.

work_type.description: Category of work, e.g. pipeline_phase, intake, intel_scan, custom.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when checkpoint was created.

current_step.description: Machine-readable position in the governing spec.

phase.description: Optional pipeline or spec phase name.

invoked_spec.description: Repo-relative path to the spec driving this work, e.g. engine/program-pipeline-orchestrator.md

spec_version.description: Version string from the spec frontmatter, for resume safety checks.

context.description: Small JSON blob: IDs, paths, last completed sub-step.

next_actions.description: Short imperative list for the resuming agent.
